title: Living in Boulder vlog 6 - 3 - 2017: Greek Classics

enrichment.summary: Kyle records a late-night vlog while high, describing a productive stay-at-home day where he worked on Greek classic books and listened to history content. He mentions getting very little sleep but staying focused and working late into the night.
enrichment.speaker: kyle

stances.position: staying in leads to more productivity — plans to do it as long as possible
willing to push through on three hours of sleep to keep working

transcript.text: Hello, Living in Boulder, V-Log for June 3rd, 2017.
Right now it's 11.30 in the evening.
I'm kind of high right now.
I think what happened was I smoked a bunch of weed and then I had a shower.
Then I got out of the shower and I was like, let's do the video.
So today, you know what, I had a pretty productive day today because I didn't go anywhere.
Today was shut-in day number one.
I should try to be a shut-out for like as long as I can.
Because, you know, you can get a lot done that way.
Going to Time Warp, just watch everything, just go to go, you know, go to go really fast.
Yeah, because I didn't go out because I got all the food yesterday.
And also, I had a good day today because I got up early.
I was working until like 4 in the morning and then I just got up at like 7 or something.
It was one of those days where I'm going to get like 3 hours of sleep, you know.
And so, yeah, and I'm not tired, you know, I'm just going to keep going.
I was, I'm like doing Greek books now.
And I'm zipping through, I think I did all the Italy ones and yeah.
And then there's like just the titles are included and those are a few, 20, you know.
But, and then there's a few more.
So, yeah, yeah, I feel like I'm just totally gobbling it up.
But, um, and I'm listening to, um, Momsen, Theodore Momsen, his Dreamer.
I'm still just in different bits and pieces with my little, you know, listening to my, uh, menu.
Finding out what I want to listen to and hearing it.
I don't really have anything to say about it right now.
But, yeah, I'm learning, um, and, uh, that's about it.
Not a whole lot.
Um, I'm, uh, working.
I think I'll get going.
Here, let's see what I'm working on right now.
Anastasius.
I need to go and find out when Anastasius lived.
Okay, so I'll tell, uh, au revoir.
